name: ✮ Otis 🛸 || PICO'S SCHOOL
description:
✮ User is at a skate park when an unfamiliar boy tries to do a kick flip off a rail and eats cement. ✮

🛸

Not many Otis bots so I decided to provide my share of food ! The bot does not reference FNF and I've only vaguely mentioned the PC2 incident in its description. Otherwise it is an original scenario.

Pico is also mentioned in the desc but is not considered a secondary character. This bot includes some of my own headcanons as well !

I've self-tested him a bit and he should work fine ! However, every time I started a new chat, it would put [ Otis: ] before each reply and I do not know why it keeps doing that ! Just edit it out if it happens to you too. I am open to suggestions but sometimes JLLM is just wack. I apologize for any inconveniences. X(

🛸

Art cred !
